features.name: Project Setup & Data Structure
features.description: Consolidate all grade 1-12 data into a single K object; fix lookup for grades 1-5 (Tiếng Việt, Khoa Học); add video data for all subjects
features.evidence: index.html — single K object with tiengviet1-5, khoahoc4-5 merged in; K[s+g] lookup works for all keys

features.name: Video Player (YouTube Embed)
features.description: Working YouTube embed player; click any video card opens modal with autoplay; dark overlay; escape to close
features.evidence: index.html — player-modal with iframe src using youtube.com/embed/{id}?autoplay=1&rel=0

features.name: In-app Search
features.description: Search within site data — finds lessons matching keywords; shows results with direct navigation; falls back to YouTube search

features.name: Responsive UI & Dark Mode
features.description: Full responsive layout (mobile/tablet/desktop); dark mode toggle with localStorage persistence; smooth animations
features.evidence: index.html — @media queries for 768px/480px; dark-mode class + localStorage theme persistence

features.name: Deployment Configuration
features.description: Vercel config, GitHub Actions workflow, package.json, README with deploy instructions
